version_description: There is no harmony, only single bass notes D (C#) / F# (C#).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
A love letter came through the mail, it said, "I miss you"[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I ripped it up and flushed with the tissue, try to forget you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
I ain't got nothing against you, we human, we all got issues[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
But I'm tired of being tired of being tired[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
That part of me done died, I see it, then I don't act like I'm blind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm confident it won't be one of mine[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]
I know emotions come with lies, so I tell the truth all the time[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Ain't got no sympathy for no bitch, I admit that I'm rich and I'm lit[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Jumping up on stages, I get two hundred an occasion[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Bro had really fucked the game up, we made niggas shut they trap down[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
They see how I made it, I'm the reason they won't rap now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
See me out in traffic, make a hater pull his hat down[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
The biggest OG's salute me, a stylist can't even style me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
The robbers probably wanna get me, I'm hopping out Lamborghinis[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
The youngins turn in my city, they try me, I get it cracking[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Some of this still would happen if I never had started rapping[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
My people them still steady trapping and they still be getting active[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I tell them to chill, I'm tryna run up these M's[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Paid cash and then he post the crib, no[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
I can't show nobody where my mama live, that's how I 'posed to feel?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
My niece just asked me were my diamonds real, I said, "Of course"[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I just played the hand that I was dealt, didn't have to force[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
All around the world they know it's me, they hear my voice[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I done it all in a pair of Diors, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    Young age, learned how to get paid[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    Big stage, long way from Section 8[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    Big wave, he gon' have to get saved[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Riding in the foreign, chiefing on the forest[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I know I wasn't there for you, at least I said I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
You know what it was, I told you that I was heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  I'm emotionally scarred, that ain't even your fault[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
But don't listen to them haters tryna fill your ears with salt[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    All this revenue coming in, I'll probably never spend[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    I just bought my BM a Benz, now that's another Benz[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    I just cut off all of my friends and brought my brothers in[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    I don't see nobody but me, who I'm gon' lose to?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    I can't move around without tools, these niggas loose screws[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    I can see me taking the lead over the new school[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    They remember me from selling weed at my old school[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    Only hit it once and now it's old news[/tab]

[Verse 5]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Blew up, who would knew? Paint my Trackhawk Nipsey Blue[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
If I get one, you get one too, I really move how bosses move[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
I never call myself a G.O.A.T., I leave that up to the people[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
Everybody can't go to the top, I had to leave some people[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
I'ma be forever scheming, woke up, I thought I was dreaming[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Watched my lil' boy play with toys, I just dropped a tear of joy[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Some shit that I feel for I been going crazy with that scoring[/tab]
[tab]                                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Call me Baby Harden, They say I'll be great, I guess I'm waiting for it[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    Young age, learned how to get paid[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    Big stage, long way from Section 8[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    Big wave, he gon' have to get saved[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Ridin' in the foreign, chiefin' on the forest[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I know I wasn't there for you, at least I said I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
You know what it was, I told you that I was heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  I'm emotionally scarred, that ain't even your fault[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
But don't listen to them haters tryna fill your ears with salt[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    Young age, learned how to get paid[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
    Big stage, long way from Section 8[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
    Big wave, he gon' have to get saved[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Ridin' in the foreign, chiefin' on the forest[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I know I wasn't there for you, at least I said I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
You know what it was, I told you that I was heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
  I'm emotionally scarred, that ain't even your fault[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
But don't listen to them haters tryna fill your ears with salt[/tab]

[ch]A[/ch]
